title: CUSB CRS Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: Central University of South Bihar (CUSB) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 CRS Project Fellow (Junior) I/II Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 09-06-2026.

basic_details.job_title: CUSB CRS Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central University of South Bihar (CUSB) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 CRS Project Fellow (Junior) I/II Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 09-06-2026.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 21 days from the date of Notification (09 June 2026)

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Physics with minimum 55% marks (not earlier than 3 years)
qualification.details: CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-I: M.Sc. (not earlier than 3 years) with a minimum of 55% marks in Physics. CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-II: M.Sc. (not earlier than 3 years) with a minimum of 55% marks in Physics with valid JEST/GATE/NET-JRF/Lectureship/UGC-CSIR NET JRF/Lectureship.

vacancy_details.Post Name: CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-I / CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-II

salary_details.details: CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-I: ₹14,000 pm + HRA @ 10% CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-II: ₹31,000 pm + HRA @ 10%

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CUSB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUSB Project Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the CRS Project Fellow (Junior) I/II posts at Central University of South Bihar is 09 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-I?
faq.answer: For the CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-I position, candidates must have an M.Sc. in Physics with a minimum of 55% marks, and the degree should not be older than 3 years.

faq.question: Q3. What are the salary details for the Project Fellow positions?
faq.answer: The salary for CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-I is ₹14,000 pm + HRA @ 10%, and for Junior-II, it is ₹31,000 pm + HRA @ 10%.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies released by CUSB?
faq.answer: Central University of South Bihar has released a total of 1 vacancy for the CRS Project Fellow (Junior) I/II posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for these posts by sending their application via Email.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of Central University of South Bihar?
faq.answer: The official website of Central University of South Bihar is not provided in the extracted data, but it can usually be found by searching for "Central University of South Bihar".

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of Central University of South Bihar?
faq.answer: Central University of South Bihar is located in Gaya, Bihar, with the pincode 824236.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific requirements for the CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-II post besides M.Sc. in Physics?
faq.answer: Yes, for the CRS Project Fellow (Junior)-II position, candidates need to have a valid JEST/GATE/NET-JRF/Lectureship/UGC-CSIR NET JRF/Lectureship in addition to the M.Sc. in Physics qualification.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the CUSB Project Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the CRS Project Fellow (Junior) I/II posts at Central University of South Bihar is 09 June 2026.
